title: Collision Box
description: Sets the width and height of the Entity's collision box.

height.title: Height
height.description:
Height of the collision box in blocks. A negative value will be assumed to be 0.

Sample values:
• allay: 0.6
• armor_stand: 1.975
• arrow: 0.25

width.title: Width
width.description:
Width of the collision box in blocks. A negative value will be assumed to be 0. Min value is -100000000.000000 Max value is 100000000.000000

Sample values:
• allay: 0.35
• armor_stand: 0.5
• arrow: 0.25
